sn14.27:1.1: At Sāvatthī. sn.ii.168 "Bhikkhus, it is by way of elements that beings come together and unite. Those who destroy life come together and unite with those who destroy life; those … as above, continuing: … who are covetous … who bear ill will … of wrong view come together and unite with those of wrong view.
sn14.27:2.1: "Those who abstain from the destruction of life … as above … who are uncovetous … without ill will … of right view come together and unite with those of right view."
